title: Robust Quick Malaysian Beef Hot-Pot
description: A peppery and bouncy Malaysian hot pot dish featuring beef stock concentrate and dashi extract, perfect for a quick and high-protein meal.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together beef stock concentrate and dashi extract until well combined.
Add the mixture to a hot pot vessel and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium low and add sliced beef, cooking for 2 minutes or until browned.
Add sliced mushrooms, chopped bok choy, and chopped green onions to the hot pot, cooking for an additional 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and sliced ginger, cooking for 1 minute.
Add whole peppercorns to the hot pot and cook for an additional minute.
Season the hot pot with sesame oil and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional green onions and serve with steamed rice or noodles if desired.
Monitor the temperature of the hot pot to ensure it remains at a safe temperature, above 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
